text: Aaj bank se EMI bounce ka message aaya aur mera dimaag sunn ho gaya, par main rone ka risk nahi le sakta kyunki UPSC Mains sar par hai. Papa ne kisan hokar apni saari zameen girvi rakh di hai meri sarkari naukri ke liye, isliye thakan chahe kitni bhi ho, mujhe padhte rehna hi hoga. Mere rukne ka matlab hai pura khandaan sadak par aa jayega, toh endurance hi ab mera ekmatra sahara hai.

Ghar ki EMI bounce ho gayi hai aur bank walo ke phone aa rahe hain, par main coaching institute ki library chhod kar ghar nahi ja sakta. Dropper stigma ki wajah se pehle hi bohot sunna padta hai, isliye ab main sirf ek machine ki tarah 16 ghante padh raha hoon taaki agli list mein naam aa jaye. Mujhme ab bilkul himmat nahi bachi, par sole earner hone ka bojh mujhe sone nahi deta.

Bank notification dekh kar pata chala ki loan ki kist nahi gayi, aur ab mujhe darr hai ki Papa ki kirana shop par bank wale na aa jayein. Main part-time content writing kar raha hoon aur saath mein PSC ki taiyari bhi, bhale hi meri aankhein thakan se band ho rahi hon. Main is breakdown ko afford nahi kar sakta kyunki mere peeche poori family ki umeed aur survival tiki hai.

Mummy ki tabiyat kharab hai aur EMI bounce ho gayi hai, par main UPSC ke mocks dena nahi chhod sakta kyunki failure ka koi margin nahi bacha. First-gen earner hone ka yahi bojh hai ki aap thak kar haar nahi maan sakte, bas ek structural endurance mein jeete rehna padta hai. Mere kandhon par jo zimmedari hai, woh mere personal dukh se kahi zyada badi hai.

EMI bounce hone se ghar ka mahol kharab hoga, isliye main ab MNC mein call center ki night shift kar raha hoon aur din mein PSC coaching ja raha hoon. Mere paas thakne ka waqt nahi hai kyunki family investment mujh par itni zyada hai ki mujhe har haal mein result dena hi hoga. Ye structural endurance hi meri reality hai, jahan emotion se zyada 'kartavya' mahatvapurna hai.
